summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Quant Analysis Dashboard. 9/9 pytest backend tests passed (health, market data for SWDA.MI / AAPL across periods 1y/2y/5y/max, invalid ticker 404, invalid period 422, metrics math sanity). Frontend e2e via Playwright passed all flows: default SWDA.MI auto-load (vol 14.73%, CAGR +14.13%, Sharpe 0.82, MDD -21.63%), period 5Y switch (n=1269), ticker search to AAPL, invalid ticker error banner (terminal red).

issues: Recharts emits 'width(-1) height(-1)' console warning during initial mount / re-render transitions; chart still renders correctly so non-blocking, but could be silenced by giving the ResponsiveContainer parent an explicit min-height during loading transition.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/health uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) – good, no naive datetime.
fetch_history correctly returns 404 on empty df and 502 on yfinance exceptions; period validated twice (Literal in route + ALLOWED_PERIODS guard) which is fine but redundant.
MongoDB not used in this app — no _id concerns.
All env vars (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) sourced correctly from process.env on frontend.
All key UI elements have data-testid as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_quant_api.py covers /api/health + /api/market/data with parametrized periods. yfinance is a live external dep — retry once if intermittent network failure. Frontend uses data-testid: ticker-search-input, ticker-search-submit, time-selector-{1y|2y|5y|max}, metric-volatility/return/sharpe/drawdown, price-chart, error-banner, symbol-ticker/last-price/period-change.
